subject: Swift Triggers 1220093, 1220094, 1220095 and 1220096 are not astrophysical
body:
B. Sbarufatti (INAF-OAB) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift Triggers 1220093, 1220094, 1220095 and 1220096 were due to an outage of the star trackers, and therefore are not astrophysical
